questionHtml:
A stone is thrown downwards from the edge of a cliff with a speed of 5.0 m s–1. It hits the ground 2.0 s later. What is the height of the cliff?

A. 20 m

B. 30 m

C. 40 m

D. 50 m

meta.title: A stone is thrown downwards from the edge of a cliff with a speed of 5.0 m s–1. It hits the ground 2.0 s later. What is the height of the cliff? A. 20 m B. 30 m C. 40 m D. 50 m
